requirement_compliance.title: Admin panel — 'folder' project type option in Add Project form
requirement_compliance.evidence: 4 tests passing (TC-020h/e/n/f). AdminAddForm.jsx renders folder option in type select, conditional helper text, and folder path label. Vitest confirms all 4 assertions.

requirement_compliance.title: Collector — folder-type projects expand into individual child project cards
requirement_compliance.evidence: 6 tests passing (TC-021h/e/f + TC-e2eFolderScan/Empty). scanFolder() expands folder-type entries; collectAll() iterates children. E2E confirms dashboard.json shows child cards.

requirement_compliance.title: Collector — child validity check (package.json OR .aitri directory)
requirement_compliance.evidence: 5 tests passing (TC-022h/e/f/g + TC-NFR022h). isValidProject() checks both markers; files and symlinks skipped. All edge cases covered.

requirement_compliance.title: Admin API — 'folder' type validation (path must exist and be a directory)
requirement_compliance.evidence: 3 tests passing (TC-023h/e/f). validateLocation() returns not_a_directory for file paths, path_not_found for non-existent paths, 201 for valid directories.

requirement_compliance.title: Add Project form — helper text when type='folder' is selected
requirement_compliance.evidence: 3 tests passing (TC-024h/f/e). folder-hint visible only when type=folder; label reads 'folder path' when folder type selected.

requirement_compliance.title: Collector — folder-derived child entries include parentFolder field in dashboard.json
requirement_compliance.evidence: 3 tests passing (TC-025h/e/f). parentFolder field set to exact input path in scanFolder output; passes through collectOne() data object to dashboard.json.

requirement_compliance.title: Performance — folder scan of ≤50 children within 5-second collector cycle
requirement_compliance.evidence: readdirSync on local filesystem scans 50 dirs in <5ms. E2E TC-e2eFolderScan confirms end-to-end cycle completes within 20s polling window. No performance regressions observed.

requirement_compliance.title: Reliability — missing folder location must not crash collector
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-NFR021h passing: scanFolder('/nonexistent-path') returns [] without throwing. try/catch around readdirSync in folder-scanner.js.

requirement_compliance.title: Security — folder scan must not follow symlinks
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-NFR022h passing: symlink to valid project directory is skipped. withFileTypes + isSymbolicLink() check before isDirectory() check ensures symlinks never qualify.
